subtitle: Senior Architecture & SDLC Governance Leader -- Enterprise Architecture | SDLC Modernization | Cross-Functional Delivery
summary_text: Senior technology leader with 14 years governing enterprise architecture decisions and SDLC delivery at Money Management International -- a national 501(c)(3) financial services nonprofit operating under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators (HIPAA, PCI-DSS, CARD Act, CFPB). Modernized SDLC through full Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints; doubled development throughput); built Enterprise PMO from scratch (25% improvement in budget and time adherence on $30-50M portfolio); owned product roadmap and architecture decisions across cloud-first migration, contact center transformation, and ERP/CRM platform evolution. Architecture roots run deep: career began as DBA / SQL Architect, with multi-tier architecture, distributed systems, and database design as the practitioner foundation under fourteen years of executive governance. Currently consulting on AI architecture, automation, and implementation.

bullets: Designed an algorithmic AI architecture evaluation framework -- scoring rubric, capability taxonomy, evaluation flow -- adopted by a national CX consulting firm to compare enterprise AI platforms with explicit governance and integration-fit dimensions.

Directed enterprise technology for a national 501(c)(3) nonprofit in the consumer credit space -- under continuous regulatory scrutiny across all 50 states plus federal regulators including the CFPB, with HIPAA, PCI-DSS, and CARD Act overlays.

Owned enterprise architecture decisions across cloud-first migration, ERP/CRM platform evolution, contact center transformation, and security posture for 14 years -- multi-tier and distributed architecture decisions, database architecture, and integration patterns at enterprise scale.
Modernized SDLC governance through full Agile transformation (SAFe 10-week to 2-week sprints); doubled development throughput and reduced concept-to-deployment timelines by up to 20% YoY.

Built Enterprise PMO from scratch; consolidated cross-functional project governance across IT and non-IT functions; delivered 25% improvement in project budget and time adherence across a $30-50M annual portfolio.
Owned multi-year platform roadmap for MMI's homegrown ERP/CRM for 8 years across 12+ executive and operations stakeholders and a 45-50 person delivery organization (BA, QA, software development).

Spearheaded multi-year transition to a digital-first, cloud-first, security-first model; migrated all enterprise workloads to Azure; sustained 100% PCI-DSS certification across multiple audit cycles alongside HIPAA and CARD Act compliance.

Led full contact center / communications platform transformation -- multi-channel integration, AI-assisted routing and coaching, integrated knowledge bots -- with zero service disruption on day-one go-live.

Built and led a 35+ direct (75+ extended) technology team across architecture, engineering, IT, software development, and global vendor partners; sustained highest retention and satisfaction in the enterprise across 14 years.
Advanced through progressive roles: DBA / SQL Architect -> IT Manager -> VP IT -> first CTO in the organization's 45+ year history.

Founded and ran a web development and IT consulting firm for 17 years -- full P&L ownership; delivered custom digital solutions for dozens of clients across content-driven and transactional verticals.
Architected and operated a proprietary commercial-grade CMS supporting dozens of production sites; direct client engagement across discovery, scope, architecture, build, and ongoing support.

skills.items: Enterprise Architecture Governance, Solution Design, Multi-Tier Architecture, Distributed Systems, Database Architecture, SDLC Governance
Agile / SAFe, Scrum, JIRA, Backlog Management, ePMO Governance, Quality Governance
Microsoft Azure, Azure DevOps, GitHub, Cloud Migration, Enterprise Integration
SQL / T-SQL, MSSQL, MySQL, PostgreSQL -- DBA / SQL Architect origin
PCI-DSS, HIPAA, CARD Act, Multi-State Regulatory, GRC Programs, Risk Assessment
DataRobot (Production ML), Power BI, Tableau, AI Architecture Evaluation, LLM Platforms
